data.name: ask_for_confirmation_tooltip
data.value: Whether to ask before executing tool

data.name: execute-python_venv_shell
data.value: Execute Shell script in Python virt. environment

data.name: prompt_selected_persona_hint
data.value: Select a persona to apply to the chat

data.name: settings-llm_additional_parameters_hint
data.value: Custom parameters sent directly to the LLM API in JSON format. Parameter names must match the API specification.

data.name: prompt_components_hint
data.value: Select additional prompt components to append to the system message

data.name: prompt_system_prompt_placeholder
data.value: for example, You are a helpful assistant

data.name: settings_max_visible_rounds_hint
data.value: Limits how many recent conversation rounds (user message + assistant response) are visible to each agent. 0 means unlimited. Helps manage context window usage.

data.name: settings_execution_order_hint
data.value: Determines the order in which agents are executed. Lower numbers execute first.

data.name: settings_can_execute_again_hint
data.value: Whether the agent can execute again after it has already executed in this cycle.

data.name: settings_execution_checker_hint
data.value: The condition that determines when the agent should execute.

data.name: settings_read_permissions_hint
data.value: Controls what types of messages and content this agent can read in the chat.

data.name: perm_user_messages_hint
data.value: Agent can read messages sent by the user.

data.name: perm_user_attachments_hint
data.value: Agent can read files attached by the user.

data.name: perm_own_messages_hint
data.value: Agent can read its own previous messages.

data.name: perm_other_agent_messages_hint
data.value: Agent can read messages from other agents.

data.name: perm_other_agent_reasoning_hint
data.value: Agent can read the reasoning/thoughts of other agents.

data.name: perm_other_agent_tool_calls_hint
data.value: Agent can read tool calls and results from other agents.

data.name: settings_agent_read_filter_hint
data.value: Restricts which agents this agent can see based on whitelist or blacklist.

data.name: agent_info_name_hint
data.value: Set a custom name for this agent. This name is used in the agent list and in the chat.

data.name: agent_info_profile_image_hint
data.value: Paste a base64-encoded image to use as the agent's avatar.

data.name: settings_can_be_mentioned_hint
data.value: Whether the agent can be mentioned by other agents and users, causing it to execute.

data.name: settings_can_mention_others_hint
data.value: Whether the agent can mention and trigger other agents.

data.name: prompt_specialization_hint
data.value: Choose a professional specialization for the assistant. This defines what the assistant knows and can do.

data.name: prompt_selected_specialization_hint
data.value: Select a specialization to define the assistant's professional role

data.name: prompt_custom_specialization_placeholder
data.value: Describe the professional role you want the assistant to have...

data.name: message_context_shield
data.value: Context shield is active, the upper messages not visible to agents

data.name: agent_info_description_hint
data.value: Provide a brief description of the agent's role and purpose. This helps other agents understand when to delegate tasks.

data.name: perm_other_agent_attachments_hint
data.value: Agent can read attachments from other agents.

data.name: perm_messages_with_tool_calls_hint
data.value: Agent can read messages that contain tool calls from other agents. If disabled, messages with tool calls are filtered out.

data.name: perm_identify_agents_as_users_hint
data.value: Other agents will be visible and treated as user messages to this agent.

data.name: settings_exposure_mode
data.value: Exposure mode (how this agent appears to others)

data.name: settings_exposure_mode_hint
data.value: Controls what parts of this agent's messages are visible to other agents.

data.name: exposure_content_hint
data.value: Expose the main content/text of this agent's messages to other agents.

data.name: exposure_reasoning_hint
data.value: Expose the reasoning/thoughts of this agent to other agents.

data.name: exposure_tool_calls_hint
data.value: Expose tool calls and their results from this agent to other agents.

data.name: exposure_attachments_hint
data.value: Expose attachments from this agent's messages to other agents.

data.name: exposure_messages_with_tool_calls_hint
data.value: Expose messages that contain tool calls. If disabled, such messages may be hidden entirely from other agents.

data.name: exposure_identify_self_as_user_hint
data.value: When enabled, this agent identifies itself as a user to other agents. Tool calls and reasoning become inaccessible regardless of other flags.

data.name: prompt_behavior_sliders_hint
data.value: Adjust behavior sliders to control the assistant's tone, style, and personality

data.name: perm_other_agent_content_hint
data.value: Agent can read main message's content from other agents.

data.name: user_login_hint
data.value: A unique identifier for the user account

data.name: user_name_hint
data.value: The display name shown in conversations and for agents

data.name: user_description_hint
data.value: Additional information about the user that agents can use to personalize responses

data.name: user_profile_image_hint
data.value: Upload a profile image for the user. PNG and JPG supported, will be resized to 128x128.

data.name: user_select_prompt
data.value: Select a user from the list to edit

data.name: settings_allow_context_shields_hint
data.value: If enabled, the agent will respect context shields and will not see messages placed after them.

data.name: settings_allow_summaries_hint
data.value: If enabled, the agent will be able to see summaries of the earlier chat history and stop reading at summarized segments.

data.name: settings_stage_adaptive_max_visible_rounds
data.value: Max visible rounds for router agent

data.name: select_python_meta_venv_activate_script
data.value: Select Python Venv activation script for metatools

data.name: python_meta_venv_activate_script_path_hint
data.value: Python Venv activation script for metatools

data.name: chat_toast_llm_not_configured_desc
data.value: Chat LLM is not configured. Please configure it in the chat settings.

data.name: chat_toast_generation_failed_desc
data.value: An error occurred while generating the response: {0}

data.name: chat_toast_agent_selection_failed_desc
data.value: Failed to select an agent for response generation.

data.name: summarize_message
data.value: Summarize this message and previous messages for context compression

data.name: enable_policy_override
data.value: Override global tool policy for this agent

data.name: tool_behaviour_none_hint
data.value: Purely computational or informational tasks (math, random, time).

data.name: tool_behaviour_filedirectorycreate_hint
data.value: The tool creates new files or directories on the filesystem.

data.name: tool_behaviour_fileread_hint
data.value: The tool reads the contents of files or directories.

data.name: tool_behaviour_fileedit_hint
data.value: The tool modifies existing file content or metadata without deleting it.

data.name: tool_behaviour_filedelete_hint
data.value: The tool permanently removes files from the filesystem.

data.name: tool_behaviour_directoryread_hint
data.value: The tool enumerates or lists the contents of directories.

data.name: tool_behaviour_directoryedit_hint
data.value: The tool modifies the directory structure (move, rename, copy).

data.name: tool_behaviour_directorydelete_hint
data.value: The tool removes entire directory trees including their contents.

data.name: tool_behaviour_readsecrets_hint
data.value: The tool may expose sensitive information such as passwords, API keys or tokens.

data.name: tool_behaviour_accessoutsideworkdir_hint
data.value: The tool accesses locations outside the configured working directory.

data.name: tool_behaviour_clipboardaccess_hint
data.value: The tool accesses the clipboard for reading or writing text data.

data.name: tool_behaviour_internetaccess_hint
data.value: The tool performs network requests to external services or APIs.

data.name: tool_behaviour_longrunningtask_hint
data.value: The tool may run for an extended period due to heavy computation or network latency.

data.name: tool_behaviour_executeexternalprocess_hint
data.value: The tool spawns or executes an external operating system process.

data.name: tool_behaviour_possiblyunexpected_hint
data.value: The tool may perform unexpected or uncontrollable actions.

data.name: tool_behaviour_runterminal_hint
data.value: The tool runs commands in an embedded terminal emulator with interactive I/O.

data.name: tool_behaviour_userinteraction_hint
data.value: The tool requires user input via forms, confirmations, file pickers, etc.

data.name: tool_behaviour_agentexecution_hint
data.value: The tool invokes, manages, or coordinates other AI agents.

data.name: tool_behaviour_scriptaccess_hint
data.value: The tool creates, modifies, or deletes other tools and user scripts at runtime.

data.name: tool_behaviour_clipboardwrite_hint
data.value: The tool writes text data to the clipboard.

data.name: tool_behaviour_clipboardread_hint
data.value: The tool reads text data from the clipboard.

data.name: tool_behaviour_mcp_hint
data.value: The tool originates from an external MCP server and may have unpredictable behaviour.

data.name: tool_behaviour_meta_hint
data.value: The tool is a meta-tool created at runtime by the LLM via Lua/Python scripting.
